name: Envirosan EazyWash 2L Handwashing Unit
description: The Envirosan 2L Handwashing Unit is a plastic bracket which holds a standard 2L bottle, and includes a self-closing valve.

taxonomy.sub_category: Envirosan EazyWash 2L Handwashing Unit Updated on August 14, 2024 · Created on June 24, 2016 Envirosan EazyWash 2L Handwashing Unit The Envirosan 2L Handwashing Unit is a plastic bracket which holds a standard 2L bottle, and includes a self-closing valve. Developed By Envirosan Tested By Agrément South Africa Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The 2L hand wash co-polymer bracket fits a standard 2L plastic bottle with a shelf for soap. The plastic bottle is fitted with a self-closing tip tap valve to prevent wasting water. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Envirosan Sanitation Solutions JoJo For Water For Life Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include TippyTap and HappyTap . Countries South Africa Manufacturing/Building Method The hand wash bracket is manufactured with a plastic polymer through plastic injection molding. Currently, Environsan has the capacity to manufacture 2000 units of the EaziTaps used in the EaziWash technology daily. Envirosan complies with globally approved manufacturing techniques, uses approved SABS raw materials, and are entirely recyclable. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model The hand-washing units are available for purchase from the manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status 600+ units have been installed. Material Co-polymer plastic Activation mechanism Self-closing tip tap valve Soap container built-in (yes/no) Yes Water volume per use (L) 100-150mL Design Specifications The system was designed to fit a standard 2-Liter plastic bottle, which can be refilled to accommodate local resources. In addition, the soap holder was designed to accept locally available bars of soap rather than liquid alternatives. Technical Support Envirosan provides direct maintenance and support to all of its customers. Replacement Components Replacement components can be purchased directly from Envirosan. Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturer sites performance targets related to environmentally friendly and sustainable solutions, cost-effective products, and providing top-quality products to South African customers. EaziWash is designed to deliver 100-150 ml of water continuously for at least 20 seconds. The designer specified performance targets includes: water use efficiency, robustness, durability, ease-of-use for children and cost effectiveness. Vetted Performance Status Envirosan’s products are tested by Agrement South Africa, although testing information about this specific product is currently unknown. Safety There are no safety concerns related to the hand-washing bracket. Complementary Technical Systems This system can be used complementary to bathrooms. Academic Research and References Naidoo, S., 2020, Handwashing stations rolled out to informal settlements to help fight disease , The Citizen. Compliance with regulations Envirosan's products are certified by Agrement South Africa, a technology assessment agency. Evaluation methods The units are evaluated during manufacturing by Envirosan employees to ensure functionality. Other Information Learn more about Envirosan from their video .
